meta.title: Share Your Memory
meta.description: Share your stories, photos, and memories of Al Fahidi Historical District — every contribution is reviewed and joins the living archive

hero.title: Share Your Memory
hero.lede: A district is kept alive not by its walls alone, but by the people who lived in it and passed through it. If you hold a story, a photo, a memory, or a document of Al Fahidi, share it here and let it become part of the living archive.

aside.title: How contributions work

one.title: Send
one.body: Fill in the form with your story, or a link to your photo or document.

two.title: We review
two.body: The editorial team reviews every contribution for accuracy and fit.

three.title: It's published
three.body: Approved contributions join the district's stories, credited to their owners.

aside.note: No account needed — contact details are optional and never shown publicly.

story.label: Story
story.hint: A tale you heard or lived in the district

photo.label: Photo
photo.hint: An old or recent photo documenting a place or a moment

memory.label: Memory
memory.hint: A personal glimpse — a scent, a sound, an unforgettable scene

document.label: Document
document.hint: A record, a map, or a newspaper clipping

title.label: Title
title.placeholder: e.g. Summer of 1978 in the Bastakiya alleys

body.label: Text
body.placeholder: Write what you remember — places, people, and the small details all matter

url.label: Link to the photo or document
url.hint: In this version we accept links only — direct upload is coming later

note.label: Note (optional)
note.placeholder: When and where was it taken? Who appears in it?

contact.label: Contact details (optional)
contact.hint: Used only to reach you about your contribution — never shown publicly

form.moderationNote: By sending, you agree that your contribution is reviewed before publishing.

errors.title: Enter a title for your contribution
errors.body: Write the text of your contribution
errors.url: Enter a valid link starting with http or https
errors.contactMax: Contact details are too long (max {max} characters)
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts in a short time — wait a minute and try again
errors.generic: Could not send your contribution — check your connection and try again

success.title: Thank you — under review
success.body: Your contribution has arrived and will appear on the platform once approved by the editorial team.
